name: RPlog_Kidnapping_Celo
title: Kidnapping Celo
summary: Leaving an estate he had successfully cased, the Chiss spy Cetolum realizes he is being tailed and turns down an alley to confront his pursuer -- Danik Kreldin (operating under the name Alois), clad in jetpack-equipped enhanced armor and shadowed by plainclothes guards. The two trade cool words before Danik throws a non-lethal glop grenade to pin Cetolum, who narrowly dodges into the rubbish. Hovering out of reach, Danik corners him and opens fire with a powerful HM-100 riot gun, blasting away Cetolum's cover and the spy himself. With Cetolum downed, Danik hauls the unconscious Chiss over his shoulder and plans a stealthy route through Coronet's sewers back to his estate for interrogation.
